Please add to the custom instructions file that at the end of every response, the assistant should include a "lessons learned" section written to HISTORY.md in this repo that records what work, what failed, and why things were done a certain way so that the assistant can read this file at the start of every new task to ensure that common mistakes are not repeated and that the assistant can build on past successes. The "lessons learned" section should be concise, factual, and focused on actionable insights for future tasks.
